acceptance_criteria.text: PartnershipSearchPage has a smaller workspace shell and extracted top control blocks.
proof: frontend/src/components/prospecting/PartnershipWorkspaceOverview.tsx owns the header, metrics, action panel, and workspace tabs.
frontend/src/components/prospecting/PartnershipRawIntakeControls.tsx owns the raw import and geo-search control panels.
frontend/src/components/prospecting/PartnershipOperationalSections.tsx owns drafts, queue, and sent/outcome sections.
frontend/src/components/prospecting/PartnershipPipelineSections.tsx owns pipeline lead cards, the board/list body, and the sticky bulk bar.
frontend/src/components/prospecting/PartnershipAnalyticsWorkspace.tsx owns the analytics workspace body.
frontend/src/pages/dashboard/PartnershipSearchPage.tsx now delegates the workspace shell to the extracted component.
Workspace routing and counts are passed through unchanged.
frontend/src/components/prospecting/partnershipApi.ts centralizes partnership endpoint paths for leads, drafts, queue, batches, reactions, export, and analytics loading.
Direct partnership endpoint calls were removed from PartnershipSearchPage except the existing request callback passed into pilot-flow helpers.
frontend/src/components/prospecting/usePartnershipWorkspaceDerivedData.ts owns lead visibility, selected lead media, queue flattening, pilot summary, flow summary, and status counters.
frontend/src/components/prospecting/partnershipExport.ts owns operator snapshot markdown/json payload formatting and CSV import template generation.

/dashboard/partnerships received a focused UX/UI pass with calmer workspace header, clearer import/search cards, more scannable pipeline rows, quieter operational sections, and less technical analytics wording.
Production frontend build passed after the partnerships UX/UI pass.
Visible outcome labels in partnerships queue, sent history, and analytics were translated to Russian operator labels while preserving API enum values.
gaps: Remaining page code is mostly local UI state, API action handlers, drag/drop handling, and render wiring.

acceptance_criteria.text: CardOverviewPage inner tab content has a calmer section structure.
proof: Competitors, rating summary, and services panels now use DashboardSection.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/CardServicesTable.tsx owns the services table, SEO proposal editing UI, sticky scrollbar, and row actions.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/CardServicesControls.tsx owns add/edit forms, optimizer panel, service meta strip, and filters.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/CardOverviewTabs.tsx owns competitors, reviews, news, and keywords tab bodies.
The services tab no longer duplicates the add-service CTA in the inner header.
Existing handlers and data flow were preserved.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/cardOverviewApi.ts centralizes card overview network calls and parse-policy normalization.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/cardServicesLogic.ts owns service source formatting and SEO-draft comparison helpers.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/useCardServiceController.ts owns service add/edit/delete, SEO optimization, bulk optimization, and accept/reject proposal state.
gaps: CardOverviewPage still coordinates top-level card data loading and cross-tab state, but service optimization orchestration is no longer local to the page.

acceptance_criteria.text: Settings nested components have fewer legacy visual patterns.
proof: AIAgentSettings uses calmer surfaces instead of the dark gradient hero and gradient active cards.
TelegramConnection no longer uses btn-iridescent for the primary action.
WhatsAppConnection and ExternalIntegrations use quieter borders and section surfaces.
AdminExternalCabinetSettings uses calmer section surfaces and wrapped action rows.
WABACredentials, TelegramBotCredentials, and NetworkManagement use calmer card, alert, and nested form surfaces.
TelegramConnection status check no longer emits routine console noise.
TelegramConnection, WhatsAppConnection, and ExternalIntegrations now use consistent rounded card shells and calmer integration copy.
gaps: Some deeper integration widgets still own their own visual styling, but the settings shell and primary widgets now match the calmer dashboard system.

acceptance_criteria.text: Build and production deploy are verified.
proof: cd frontend && npm run build passed.
./scripts/deploy_frontend_dist.sh --build completed.
Production verification passed with docker compose ps, app logs, and curl -I http://localhost:8000.
curl https://localos.pro/.git/config returned SPA index.html, not a real git config.
Final pass build succeeded via frontend npm run build; main JS is /assets/index-DisXlU4x.js.

Local browser smoke passed for /dashboard/profile, /dashboard/card-overview, /dashboard/progress, /dashboard/partnership-search, and /dashboard/settings with no ReferenceError/chunk-load/white-screen errors.
Frontend-only deploy completed and production verification returned HTTP/1.1 200 OK.
Final pass build succeeded via frontend npm run build; CardOverviewPage chunk is /assets/CardOverviewPage-7NaBCcs8.js and PartnershipSearchPage chunk is /assets/PartnershipSearchPage-BrEZqXH6.js.
Partnerships UX/UI pass build succeeded via frontend npm run build; PartnershipSearchPage chunk is /assets/PartnershipSearchPage-TGIap_fQ.js.
Final frontend deploy passed; live HTML references /assets/index-2B07cX0O.js and /dashboard/partnerships returns 200.
